Warren, I got in my car and turned my phone on and had a text from Cannon Katie to<|19.94|> <|19.94|> me and to Sarah Strand, our youth minister, asking if<|24.10|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> two of our youth who go to Evergreen High School, if they were okay,<|6.00|> <|6.00|> we immediately reached out to them and to their parents and thank God they were safe.<|12.00|> <|12.00|> Thank God.<|16.00|> <|16.00|> That was not the only tragedy, of course, that occurred on Wednesday.<|23.00|> <|23.00|> We're in a world of hurt.<|26.00|> <|26.00|> Christ have mercy.<|29.00|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> When things like this happen, they're all the familiar political responses.<|7.20|> <|7.20|> I will not rehearse them here.<|11.60|> <|11.60|> My prayer is always that people of goodwill across the entire political spectrum,<|20.40|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> We'll do what they can and come together.<|4.24|> <|4.24|> All of us have something to do, a role to play a part in this, and that we can do whatever<|11.54|> <|11.54|> we can to make our country less violent, including laws, including humility and not polarization.<|22.40|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> For months here at the cathedral, we've been praying for our elected leaders that they would search relentlessly for peace.<|8.00|> <|8.00|> Have you heard that? I know you've prayed it in your own way. We probably should add, "at home and abroad."<|19.00|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> All of that is urgent to do whatever we can.<|9.00|> <|9.00|> All of it's urgent to try and beings, on our own, we can't fully free ourselves from brokenness.<|11.06|> <|11.06|> So in baptism, for example, Episcopalians promise to strive for justice and peace among<|17.36|> <|17.36|> all people, but we add at the very end, "I will with God's help."<|23.78|> <|23.78|> We sound like our friends in AA and NA.<|27.20|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> who say that they
